headline.text: ML4 chiller compressor tripped *5+ times* in 24 hours — line stuck at 20 MPM, vendor support requested.

per_plant_summary.L1: S3 ran all shift with a Matrix 3 printer clog at 10:19 driving scrap to 127 bags by 10:00. S2 finished the jar run with 26 boxes leftover and a leaking depositor nozzle. ML1 completed the rice crispy bar run after multiple tempering issues overnight, then started changeover cleaning. PECO pallet count remains tight at 48 for S3.
per_plant_summary.L2: ML2 PTL pump stopped at 00:26, was cleaned and reinstalled twice (first time improperly causing a leak), then seized again at 09:52 with buffer at 67%. ML3 found a broken depositor auger blade at 22:53 that allowed water to drip onto the sweco; tank drained as precaution, no foreign material found, line restarted at 05:30. Last pallet of cookies delivered; ML2 will likely go short on current order.
per_plant_summary.L3: ML4 main chiller compressor 1 tripped 5+ times across all three shifts; line remains at 20 MPM with depositor #1 shut off to reduce cooling demand. Matt Hatch contacted Weisshaar for vendor support. TG3 down 2 hours overnight for film ripping, back up at 04:17 after switching film twice and a CIL.

watchlist.reason: ML2 ingredient mixer shortage (3 of 4 failed) — no update in window but impacts line capacity if mixers fail again
Twist Wrap overfilled trays causing weight issues — 8 days open, kitchen operator re-trained but no confirmation of sustained fix

notes.text: S2 finished the jar run with 26 boxes of caramel leftover; leftover 10200 chocolate (37% melting tank, 25% decorator buffer) will be transferred to S3 and mixed with 10226 for the next pretzel thins run per Candon's approval.
ML3 replaced sweco screen at first shift startup after discovering holes; new screen ATP passed at 11:02.

opened_today.title: ML2 PTL pump failed twice in 8 hours — seized after reinstall
opened_today.summary: PTL pump stopped at 00:26, was cleaned and reinstalled improperly (leaked), reinstalled correctly, then seized again at 09:52 — buffer now at 67% and falling.

opened_today.summary: Depositor auger blade broke at 22:53 with water dripping onto sweco; tank drained as precaution, no foreign material found, blade replaced, line restarted at 05:30.

opened_today.summary: Last pallet of cookies delivered; only 1,050 lbs left but need material for 1,180 cases — line will go short on current order.

opened_today.summary: One nozzle on the caramel depositor is leaking; needs repair before next run.

opened_today.summary: Packaging label shows "sea salk" instead of "sea salt" — IMS reports they cannot modify; needs escalation to correct labeling.
